bridge_equation_v38.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v38 = mix(B_plastic_v37, L_sys_field, 1 - P_sys_field, D_feature_v32, 1 - G_brain_v32)
bridge_equation_v38.structure_term: B_struct_v38 = mix(B_struct_v37, S_sys_field, R_sys_field, 1 - P_sys_field, D_structure_v32)
bridge_equation_v38.readiness_term: R_train_v38 = mix(R_train_v37, B_plastic_v38, B_struct_v38, R_sys_field, D_align_v32, 1 - P_sys_field)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v38 checks whether systemic low-risk field extension begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more connected and field-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
